## Court: Besançon

## Discovery
- Page: https://www.cours-appel.justice.fr/besancon/experts-judiciaires
- PDF: https://www.cours-appel.justice.fr/sites/default/files/2026-02/Annuaire%20experts%202026.pdf
- PDF title: Annuaire des experts - 2026

## Date signals found (all sources, pre-parsed)
1. [page-text] "mise à jour : 24/02/2026" → 2026-02-24
2. [url-path] "/2026-02/" → 2026-02-01

## Rules
- Pick the most specific and most recent date
- A year-only date must never override an exact date from any other source
- If multiple exact dates exist, prefer pdf-content > page-text > link-text > filename > url-path
- Date format: YYYY-MM-DD
